title: Base Block Schema
description: Foundation schema for all content blocks in the Polyglot Dev Atlas.

id.description: Unique identifier for the block. Used for anchoring and $ref resolution.

type.description: Block type that determines rendering strategy.

title.description: Display title for the block (used in navigation and block headers).

description.description: Brief description of block content (for SEO, search indexing).

is_collapsible.description: Whether the block can be collapsed by the user.

is_collapsed.description: Initial collapse state (only used if is_collapsible is true).

class.description: Custom CSS classes to apply to the block.

$ref.description: JSON pointer reference to another block definition (e.g., '#/content/0' or '@core/language_icons').

metadata.description: Optional metadata tags for filtering and categorization.
